                  color:"rgba(255,255,255,.5)",fontSize:18,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center"}}>
                ⏭
              </button>
            </div>

            {/* Stop button */}
            <button onClick={stopAudio}
              style={{width:"100%",padding:"13px",borderRadius:"var(--radius)",cursor:"pointer",
                background:"transparent",border:"1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08)",
                color:"rgba(255,255,255,.3)",fontFamily:"'Barlow',sans-serif",fontSize:14,
                letterSpacing:".3px"}}>
              ✕ Ukončit audio
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* SHEET */}
      {/* COMMISSIONER SIMULATOR */}
      {commMode&&(
        <div style={{position:"fixed",inset:0,background:"#000",zIndex:500,
          display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",
          fontFamily:"'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif"}}>

          {commPhase==="intro"&&(
            <div style={{maxWidth:440,width:"100%",padding:"40px 32px",textAlign:"center"}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:14,letterSpacing:"4px",color:"rgba(255,255,255,.9)",
                textTransform:"uppercase",marginBottom:24,fontWeight:700}}>
                Ministerstvo vnitra České republiky
              </div>
              <div style={{fontSize:14,letterSpacing:"4px",color:"rgba(255,255,255,.7)",
                textTransform:"uppercase",marginBottom:48,fontWeight:600}}>
                Zkouška odborné způsobilosti
              </div>
              <div style={{width:80,height:1,background:"rgba(242,194,48,.85)",margin:"0 auto 48px"}}/>
              <div style={{fontSize:14,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.92)",lineHeight:1.8,marginBottom:48,fontWeight:600,
                fontFamily:"'Barlow',sans-serif",letterSpacing:0}}>
                Vítejte u zkoušky zbrojního oprávnění.<br/>
                Před zahájením si prosím přečtěte pokyny:<br/><br/>
                • Test obsahuje <strong style={{color:"rgba(255,255,255,.9)"}}>30 otázek</strong> ze všech oblastí.<br/>
                • Časový limit je <strong style={{color:"rgba(255,255,255,.9)"}}>40 minut</strong>.<br/>
                • Pro splnění obecného ZO potřebujete <strong style={{color:"rgba(255,255,255,.9)"}}>26 správných odpovědí</strong>.<br/>
                • Pro rozšířené ZO <strong style={{color:"rgba(255,255,255,.9)"}}>28 správných odpovědí</strong>.<br/><br/>
                Po stisku tlačítka <strong style={{color:"rgba(242,194,48,.95)"}}>ZAHÁJIT ZKOUŠKU</strong> začne odpočet.
              </div>
              <div style={{display:"flex",gap:12}}>
                <button onClick={()=>setCommMode(false)}
                  style={{flex:1,padding:"14px",background:"transparent",border:"1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.15)",
                    color:"rgba(255,255,255,.4)",fontFamily:"'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif",
                    fontSize:14,letterSpacing:"1px",cursor:"pointer",borderRadius:8}}>
                  ZRUŠIT
                </button>
                <button onClick={()=>{
                    setCommPhase("countdown");
                    let c=5;setCommCountdown(c);
                    commTimerRef.current=setInterval(()=>{
                      c--;setCommCountdown(c);
                      if(c<=0){
                        clearInterval(commTimerRef.current);
                        setCommMode(false);
                        // Start exam in commissioner style
                        const zakon=shuffle(ALL_QUESTIONS.filter(q=>q.id>=1&&q.id<=648)).slice(0,17);
                        const nauka=shuffle(ALL_QUESTIONS.filter(q=>q.id>=649&&q.id<=779)).slice(0,5);
                        const bezp=shuffle(ALL_QUESTIONS.filter(q=>q.id>=780&&q.id<=799)).slice(0,5);
                        const zdrav=shuffle(ALL_QUESTIONS.filter(q=>q.id>=800&&q.id<=837)).slice(0,3);
                        // dle §27 zákona 90/2024 Sb.: 17+5+5+3
                        const taken=[...zakon,...nauka,...bezp,...zdrav];
                        setQs(taken);setQi(0);setAns({});setSel(null);setShowFb(false);setAiTxt(null);
                        setDone(false);setShowRev(false);setMode("commissioner");setTab("quiz");
                        setTime(EXAM_MIN*60);setSheet(null);
                      }
                    },1000);
                  }}
                  style={{flex:2,padding:"14px",background:"rgba(242,194,48,.2)",
                    border:"1px solid rgba(242,194,48,.7)",color:"var(--gold)",
                    fontFamily:"'Bebas Neue',sans-serif",fontSize:18,letterSpacing:"2px",
                    cursor:"pointer",borderRadius:8}}>
                  ZAHÁJIT ZKOUŠKU
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}

          {commPhase==="countdown"&&(
            <div style={{textAlign:"center"}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:14,letterSpacing:"4px",color:"rgba(255,255,255,.3)",
                textTransform:"uppercase",marginBottom:40}}>
                Zkouška začíná za
              </div>
              <div style={{fontFamily:"'Bebas Neue',sans-serif",fontSize:120,color:"var(--gold)",
                lineHeight:1,animation:"pulse 1s ease-in-out infinite"}}>
                {commCountdown}
              </div>
              <div style={{fontSize:14,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.6)",marginTop:40,letterSpacing:"1px"}}>
                Připravte se...
              </div>
              <style>{`@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:.6}}`}</style>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      )}

      {sheet&&(
        <div className="overlay" onClick={()=>setSheet(null)}>
          <div className="sheet" onClick={e=>e.stopPropagation()}>
            <div className="sheet-title">Vyberte režim</div>
            <button className="sheet-btn" onClick={()=>startTest(sheet.pool,"learn")}>
              <span className="sheet-btn-ico">📖</span>
              <div><h4>Výukový mód</h4><p>AI vysvětlení po každé odpovědi • {sheet.pool.length} otázek</p></div>
            </button>
            <button className="sheet-btn" onClick={()=>startTest(sheet.pool,"exam")}>
              <span className="sheet-btn-ico">🎯</span>
              <div><h4>Zkouškový mód</h4><p>Bez nápovědy • {Math.min(EXAM_Q,sheet.pool.length)} otázek • 40 min</p></div>
            </button>
            <button className="sheet-cancel" onClick={()=>setSheet(null)}>Zrušit</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* ── QUIZ ── */}
      {tab==="quiz"&&!done&&q&&(
        <div className="scr">
          <div className="qhdr">
            <div className="qhdr-top" style={{gap:6}}>
              {/* ZPĚT */}
              <button className="back-btn" style={{opacity:qi===0?.3:1,flex:"none",padding:"7px 11px"}}
                disabled={qi===0}
                onClick={()=>{
                  if(qi>0){setQi(qi-1);}
                }}>←</button>

              {/* MODUS BADGE uprostřed */}
              <span className={`mode-badge ${mode==="exam"||mode==="commissioner"?"exam":"learn"}`} style={{flex:1,textAlign:"center"}}>
                {mode==="commissioner"?"⚖️ Komisař":mode==="exam"?"⏱ Zkouška":"📖 Výuka"}
              </span>

              {/* VPŘED */}
              <button className="back-btn" style={{flex:"none",padding:"7px 11px"}}
                onClick={()=>{
                  if(qi+1<qs.length){setQi(qi+1);}
                  else{finishNow();}
                }}>
                {qi+1<qs.length?"→":"✓"}
              </button>

              {/* UKONČIT */}
              <button className="back-btn" style={{flex:"none",padding:"7px 10px",color:"var(--red)",opacity:.7}}
                onClick={()=>{setTab("home");setMode(null);clearInterval(timerRef.current);}}>✕</button>
            </div>
            <div className="prog-wrap">
              <div className="prog-bar"><div className="prog-fill" style={{width:`${(qi/qs.length)*100}%`}}/></div>
              <span className="prog-label">{qi+1} / {qs.length}</span>
            </div>
          </div>
          {(mode==="exam"||mode==="commissioner")&&(
            <div className="timer-row" style={mode==="commissioner"?{
              background:"rgba(0,0,0,.8)",margin:"4px 0",padding:"8px 20px",
              borderBottom:"1px solid rgba(242,194,48,.12)"}:{}}>
              <span className={`timer ${timeLeft<300?"warn":""}`}
                style={mode==="commissioner"?{
                  fontFamily:"'Bebas Neue',sans-serif",fontSize:26,letterSpacing:"3px",
                  color:timeLeft<300?"var(--red)":"var(--gold)"}:{}}>
                {fmtT(timeLeft)}
              </span>
              {mode==="commissioner"&&(
                <span style={{fontFamily:"'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif",fontSize:14,
                  color:"rgba(255,255,255,.3)",letterSpacing:"2px"}}>
                  {qi+1} / {qs.length}
                </span>
              )}
              {mode!=="commissioner"&&(
                <button className={`bk-btn ${bookmarks.includes(q.id)?"on":""}`} onClick={()=>toggleBk(q.id)}>
                  {bookmarks.includes(q.id)?"🔖":"🏳️"}
                </button>
              )}
            </div>
          )}
          {mode==="learn"&&(
            <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"flex-end",padding:"4px 20px 0"}}>
              <button className={`bk-btn ${bookmarks.includes(q.id)?"on":""}`} onClick={()=>toggleBk(q.id)}>
                {bookmarks.includes(q.id)?"🔖":"🏳️"}
              </button>
            </div>
          )}
          <div className="qcard" style={mode==="commissioner"?{
            background:"#0A0A0A",border:"1px solid rgba(242,194,48,.4)",
            borderTop:"2px solid var(--gold)"}:{}}>
            <div className="q-meta" style={mode==="commissioner"?{color:"rgba(201,168,76,.8)",fontWeight:600}:{}}>
              <span className="q-num">#{q.id}</span>
              <span style={{color:CATS[q.cat]?.color}}>{CATS[q.cat]?.ico} {CATS[q.cat]?.label}</span>
            </div>
            {q.img&&<img className="q-img" src={`data:image/jpeg;base64,${q.img}`} alt=""/>}
            <div className="q-text" style={mode==="commissioner"?{color:"#FFFFFF",fontWeight:500,fontSize:16,letterSpacing:".2px"}:{}}>{q.text}</div>
            <div className="q-tema">{q.tema}</div>
          </div>
          <div className="answers" data-mode={mode}>
            {["A","B","C"].map(l=>{
              let cls="ans-btn";
              if(showFb&&mode==="learn"){
                if(l===q.ok)cls+=" revealed";
                if(l===sel&&l!==q.ok)cls="ans-btn wrong";
                if(l===sel&&l===q.ok)cls="ans-btn correct";
              }else if(sel===l&&(mode==="exam"||mode==="commissioner"))cls+=" revealed";
              return(
                <button key={l} className={cls} onClick={()=>handleAns(l)} disabled={!!sel}>
                  <span className="ans-letter">{l}</span><span>{q[l]}</span>
                </button>
              );
            })}
          </div>
          {showFb&&mode==="learn"&&(
            <>
              <div className={`feedback ${sel===q.ok?"ok":"bad"}`}>
                {sel===q.ok?"✓ Správně!": `✗ Správná odpověď: ${q.ok}) ${q[q.ok]}`}
              </div>
              <div className="ai-box">
                <div className="ai-label">✦ Vysvětlení AI</div>
                {aiLoad?<div className="ai-loading">Generuji vysvětlení…</div>:<div className="ai-text">{aiTxt}</div>}
              </div>
              {/* LAW REFERENCE */}
              <div style={{margin:"4px 16px 0"}}>
                <button onClick={()=>setShowLaw(s=>!s)}
                  style={{width:"100%",padding:"10px 14px",background:"var(--bg1)",
                    border:"1px solid var(--border2)",borderRadius:"var(--radius)",
                    color:"var(--text3)",fontFamily:"'Barlow',sans-serif",fontSize:14,
                    cursor:"pointer",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"space-between"}}>
                  <span>📖 Zákonné podklady k otázce #{q?.id}</span>
                  <span>{showLaw?"▲":"▼"}</span>
                </button>
                {showLaw&&(
                  <div style={{background:"var(--bg2)",border:"1px solid var(--border2)",
                    borderTop:"none",borderRadius:"0 0 var(--radius) var(--radius)",padding:"14px",
                    fontSize:14,color:"var(--text2)",lineHeight:1.7}}>
                    <LawRef qid={q?.id} cat={q?.cat}/>
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
              <div className="next-row">
                <button className="btn-primary" onClick={nextQ}>{qi+1>=qs.length?"Zobrazit výsledky":"Další →"}</button>
              </div>
            </>
          )}
          {sel&&mode==="exam"&&!ans[qs[qi-1]?.id]&&<div className="exam-confirm">Odpověď zaznamenána</div>}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* ── RESULT ── */}
      {tab==="quiz"&&done&&(
        <div className="scr">
          {!showRev?(
            <div className="result-wrap">
              <div className="score-ring" style={{"--pct":`${pct}%`}}>
                <div className="score-inner">
                  <div className="score-num">{cor}</div>
                  <div className="score-denom">z {qs.length}</div>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div className="result-title">{passed?"Uspěl jste":"Zkuste znovu"}</div>
              <div className="result-sub">
                {(mode==="exam"||mode==="commissioner")?(
                  cor>=28?"✓ Splněno pro obecné i rozšířené ZO":
                  cor>=26?"✓ Splněno pro obecné ZO (nestačí pro rozšířené)":
                  "✗ Nesplněno — potřeba min. 26/30"
                ):(`${pct}% úspěšnost`)}
              </div>

              {/* CELKOVÉ VÝSLEDKY */}
              <div className="result-box">
                {[
                  ["Správně",cor,"pass"],
                  ["Chybně",qs.length-cor,"fail"],
                  ["Úspěšnost",`${pct}%`,passed?"pass":"fail"],
                  ...((mode==="exam"||mode==="commissioner")?[
                    ["Obecné ZO (26/30)",cor>=26?"✓ Splněno":"✗ Nesplněno",cor>=26?"pass":"fail"],
                    ["Rozšířené ZO (28/30)",cor>=28?"✓ Splněno":"✗ Nesplněno",cor>=28?"pass":"fail"],
                  ]:[])
                ].map(([l,v,c],i)=>(
                  <div key={i} className="result-row">
                    <span>{l}</span><span className={c}>{v}</span>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>

              {/* ANALÝZA PODLE KATEGORIÍ */}
              <div style={{fontFamily:"'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif",fontSize:14,fontWeight:700,
                letterSpacing:"2px",color:"var(--text3)",textTransform:"uppercase",
                margin:"14px 0 8px",textAlign:"left"}}>
                Analýza podle kategorií
              </div>
              <div className="result-box">
                {Object.entries(CATS).map(([cat,{label,ico,color}])=>{
                  const catQs=qs.filter(q=>q.cat===cat);
                  if(catQs.length===0)return null;
                  const catCor=catQs.filter(q=>ans[q.id]===q.ok).length;
                  const catPct=Math.round(catCor/catQs.length*100);
                  return(
                    <div key={cat} style={{padding:"8px 0",borderBottom:"1px solid var(--border2)"}}>
                      <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center",marginBottom:5}}>
                        <span style={{fontSize:15,color:"#FFFFFF",fontWeight:600}}>{ico} {label}</span>
                        <span style={{fontSize:14,fontWeight:600,color:catPct>=80?"var(--green)":catPct>=50?"var(--gold)":"var(--red)"}}>
                          {catCor}/{catQs.length} ({catPct}%)
                        </span>
                      </div>
                      <div style={{height:4,background:"var(--bg3)",borderRadius:2,overflow:"hidden"}}>
                        <div style={{height:"100%",borderRadius:2,
                          width:`${catPct}%`,
                          background:catPct>=80?"var(--green)":catPct>=50?"var(--gold)":"var(--red)"}}/>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  );
                })}
              </div>

              {/* AKCE */}
              <div className="next-row" style={{flexDirection:"column"}}>
                {qs.filter(q=>ans[q.id]!==q.ok).length>0&&(
                  <button className="btn-primary"
                    onClick={()=>startTest(qs.filter(q=>ans[q.id]!==q.ok),"learn")}>
                    🎯 Procvičit chybné ({qs.filter(q=>ans[q.id]!==q.ok).length} otázek)
                  </button>
                )}
                <button className="btn-secondary" onClick={()=>setShowRev(true)}>🔍 Přehled odpovědí</button>
                <button className="btn-secondary" onClick={()=>startTest(qs,mode)}>🔄 Zopakovat stejný test</button>
                <button className="btn-secondary" onClick={()=>{setTab("home");setMode(null);}}>← Hlavní menu</button>
              </div>
            </div>
          ):(
            <div className="scr">
              <div className="page-hdr">
                <button className="back-btn" onClick={()=>setShowRev(false)}>← Zpět</button>
                <span className="page-title">Přehled odpovědí</span>
              </div>
              <div className="review-list">
                {qs.map((qq,i)=>{
                  const ua=ans[qq.id];const isOk=ua===qq.ok;
                  return(
                    <div key={qq.id} className={`review-item ${isOk?"ok":"bad"}`}>
                      <div className="review-q">{i+1}. #{qq.id} {CATS[qq.cat]?.ico} {qq.text}</div>
                      <div className={`review-a ${isOk?"ok":"bad"}`} style={{marginTop:6}}>
                        Vaše: {ua?`${ua}) ${qq[ua]}`:"—"}
                      </div>
                      {!isOk&&<div className="review-correct" style={{marginTop:4}}>✓ Správně: {qq.ok}) {qq[qq.ok]}</div>}
                    </div>
                  );
                })}
              </div>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* ── HOME ── */}
      {tab==="home"&&!subTab&&(
        <div className="scr">
          <div className="hero">
            <div className="hero-eyebrow">Zákon č. 90/2024 Sb.</div>
            <div className="hero-title">ZBROJAK<span>AI</span></div>
            <div className="hero-sub">Kompletní příprava na zkoušku zbrojního oprávnění</div>
            <div className="hero-badges">
              <span className="badge">837 otázek</span>
              <span className="badge">69 obrázků</span>
              <span className="badge">AI instruktor</span>
              <span className="badge" style={{cursor:"pointer",userSelect:"none"}}
                onClick={()=>setDarkMode(d=>!d)}>
                {darkMode?"☀️ Světlý":"🌙 Tmavý"}
              </span>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="section-label">
            <div className="section-label-line"/>
            <span className="section-label-text">Test ZOZ</span>
            <div className="section-label-line"/>
          </div>
          <div style={{padding:"0 16px 6px"}}>
            <div className="exam-card" onClick={()=>{setCommMode(true);setCommPhase("intro");setCommCountdown(5);}}>
              <div className="exam-card-inner">
                <h2>Zahájit test</h2>
                <p style={{color:"rgba(232,213,163,.8)",fontSize:14}}>Realistická simulace zkoušky zbrojního oprávnění</p>
                <div className="exam-meta">
                  <div className="exam-meta-item"><span>⚖️</span>Komisařský mód</div>
                  <div className="exam-meta-item"><span>⏱</span>40 minut</div>
                  <div className="exam-meta-item"><span>📋</span>30 otázek</div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="section-label">
            <div className="section-label-line"/>
            <span className="section-label-text">Procvičovat</span>
            <div className="section-label-line"/>
          </div>
          <div className="card-grid">
            {[
              {ico:"📚",l:"Podle kategorie",d:"Zákon, nauka, bezpečnost, zdraví",a:()=>setSubTab("cats")},
              {ico:"🎯",l:"Podle tématu",d:"Konkrétní okruhy zkoušky",a:()=>setSubTab("temas")},
              {ico:"📖",l:"Procházet otázky",d:"Otázky v pořadí 1–837",a:()=>setSubTab("browse")},
            {ico:"⚡",l:"Krizové scénáře",d:`${SCENARIOS.length} interaktivních situací`,a:()=>setSubTab("scenarios")},
            {ico:"💡",l:"Mýty vs. Realita",d:`${MYTHS.length} nejčastějších omylů`,a:()=>setSubTab("myths")},
            {ico:"🎧",l:"Audio režim",d:"Učení v autě nebo MHD",a:()=>setSubTab("audio")},
            {ico:"🎯",l:"Trénink slabých míst",d:()=>{
              const w=Object.entries(weakMap).filter(([id,s])=>s.total>0&&s.correct/s.total<0.7);
              return w.length>0?`${w.length} problémových otázek`:"Zatím žádná data — nejprve udělejte test";
            },a:()=>{
              const weakIds=Object.entries(weakMap)
                .filter(([id,s])=>s.total>0&&s.correct/s.total<0.7)
                .sort(([,a],[,b])=>(a.correct/a.total)-(b.correct/b.total))
                .slice(0,30)
                .map(([id])=>parseInt(id));
              const weakQs=ALL_QUESTIONS.filter(q=>weakIds.includes(q.id));
              if(weakQs.length>0)setSheet({pool:weakQs,label:"Slabá místa"});
              else alert("Zatím žádná data. Nejprve dokončete alespoň jeden test.");
            }},
              {ico:"🔍",l:"Hledat otázku",d:"Vyhledávání v textu",a:()=>setSubTab("search")},
              {ico:"🔖",l:"Záložky",d:`${bkQs.length} uložených otázek`,a:()=>bkQs.length>0?setSheet({pool:bkQs}):setSubTab("bookmarks")},
            ].map((x,i)=>(
              <div key={i} className="list-card" onClick={x.a}>
                <div className="list-card-ico" style={{background:CATS[["zákon","nauka","bezpečnost","zdraví"][i%4]]?.bg||"var(--bg2)"}}>
                  {x.ico}
                </div>
                <div className="list-card-text"><h3>{x.l}</h3><p>{typeof x.d==="function"?x.d():x.d}</p></div>
                <span className="list-card-arr">›</span>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>

          <div className="section-label">
            <div className="section-label-line"/>
            <span className="section-label-text">AI Instruktor</span>
            <div className="section-label-line"/>
          </div>
          <div className="card-grid" style={{marginBottom:8}}>
            <div className="list-card" onClick={()=>setTab("chat")}>
              <div className="list-card-ico" style={{background:"rgba(148,180,200,.1)"}}>🤖</div>
              <div className="list-card-text"><h3>Chat s AI instruktorem</h3><p>Dotazy na zákon, kategorie, zkoušku…</p></div>
              <span className="list-card-arr">›</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* ── KATEGORIE ── */}
      {tab==="home"&&subTab==="cats"&&(
        <div className="scr">
          <div className="page-hdr">
            <button className="back-btn" onClick={()=>setSubTab(null)}>← Zpět</button>
            <span className="page-title">Podle kategorie</span>
          </div>
          <div className="card-grid" style={{paddingTop:12}}>
            {Object.entries(CATS).map(([cat,{label,ico,color,bg}])=>{
              const cnt=ALL_QUESTIONS.filter(q=>q.cat===cat).length;
              return(
                <div key={cat} className="list-card" onClick={()=>setSheet({pool:ALL_QUESTIONS.filter(q=>q.cat===cat)})}>
                  <div className="list-card-ico" style={{background:bg}}>{ico}</div>
                  <div className="list-card-text"><h3>{label}</h3><p>{cnt} otázek</p></div>
                  <span className="list-card-arr">›</span>
                </div>
              );
            })}
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* ── TÉMATA ── */}
      {tab==="home"&&subTab==="temas"&&(
        <div className="scr">
          <div className="page-hdr">
            <button className="back-btn" onClick={()=>setSubTab(null)}>← Zpět</button>
            <span className="page-title">Podle tématu</span>
          </div>
          {Object.entries(CATS).map(([cat,{label,ico,color}])=>(
            <div key={cat}>
              <div className="section-label">
                <div className="section-label-line"/>
                <span className="section-label-text">{ico} {label}</span>
                <div className="section-label-line"/>
              </div>
              {Object.entries(temas[cat]||{}).map(([tema,pool])=>(
                <div key={tema} className="topic-item" onClick={()=>setSheet({pool})}>
                  <div className="topic-dot" style={{background:color}}/>
                  <h4>{tema}</h4>
                  <span>{pool.length} ot.</span>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* ── PROCHÁZENÍ ── */}
      {tab==="home"&&subTab==="browse"&&(
        <div className="scr">
          <div className="page-hdr">
            <button className="back-btn" onClick={()=>{setSubTab(null);setBqi(0);setBSel(null);}}>← Zpět</button>
            <span className="page-title">#{bq?.id} / {ALL_QUESTIONS.length}</span>
            <button className={`bk-btn ${bookmarks.includes(bq?.id)?"on":""}`}
              style={{marginLeft:"auto"}} onClick={()=>toggleBk(bq?.id)}>
              {bookmarks.includes(bq?.id)?"🔖":"🏳️"}
            </button>
          </div>
          <div className="prog-wrap" style={{padding:"8px 20px 0"}}>
            <div className="prog-bar"><div className="prog-fill" style={{width:`${(bqi/ALL_QUESTIONS.length)*100}%`}}/></div>
          </div>
          <div style={{padding:"7px 16px 0"}}>
            <input className="browse-jump" type="number" min="1" max="837"
              placeholder="Skok na číslo otázky…"
              onKeyDown={e=>{if(e.key==="Enter"){const n=parseInt(e.target.value);if(n>=1&&n<=ALL_QUESTIONS.length){setBqi(n-1);setBSel(null);e.target.value=""}}}}
            />
          </div>
          {bq&&(
            <>
              <div className="qcard">
                <div className="q-meta">
                  <span className="q-num">#{bq.id}</span>
                  <span style={{color:CATS[bq.cat]?.color}}>{CATS[bq.cat]?.ico} {bq.cat}</span>
                </div>
                {bq.img&&<img className="q-img" src={`data:image/jpeg;base64,${bq.img}`} alt=""/>}
                <div className="q-text">{bq.text}</div>
                <div className="q-tema">{bq.tema}</div>
              </div>
              <div className="answers">
                {["A","B","C"].map(l=>{
                  let cls="ans-btn";
                  if(bSel){
                    if(l===bq.ok)cls+=" revealed";
                    if(l===bSel&&l!==bq.ok)cls="ans-btn wrong";
                    if(l===bSel&&l===bq.ok)cls="ans-btn correct";
                  }
                  return(
                    <button key={l} className={cls} onClick={()=>setBSel(l)}>
                      <span className="ans-letter">{l}</span><span>{bq[l]}</span>
                    </button>
                  );
                })}
              </div>
              {bSel&&(
                <div className={`feedback ${bSel===bq.ok?"ok":"bad"}`}>
                  {bSel===bq.ok?"✓ Správně!": `✗ Správná: ${bq.ok}) ${bq[bq.ok]}`}
                </div>
              )}
              <div className="next-row">
                <button className="btn-secondary" style={{flex:"none",padding:"14px 18px"}}
                  onClick={()=>{if(bqi>0){setBqi(bqi-1);setBSel(null)}}}>←</button>
                <button className="btn-primary"
                  onClick={()=>{if(bqi+1<ALL_QUESTIONS.length){setBqi(bqi+1);setBSel(null)}}}>
                  {bqi+1<ALL_QUESTIONS.length?"Další →":"Konec"}
                </button>
              </div>
            </>
          )}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* ── HLEDÁNÍ ── */}
      {tab==="home"&&subTab==="search"&&(
        <div className="scr">
          <div className="page-hdr">
            <button className="back-btn" onClick={()=>{setSubTab(null);setSearch("")}}>← Zpět</button>
            <span className="page-title">Hledat otázku</span>
          </div>
          <div className="search-wrap">
            <input className="search-inp" value={search} onChange={e=>setSearch(e.target.value)}
              placeholder="Hledejte v textu otázek…" autoFocus/>
          </div>
          <div style={{padding:"8px 0"}}>
            {search.length>=2&&searchResults.length===0&&(
              <div style={{padding:"24px",textAlign:"center",color:"var(--text3)",fontSize:14}}>Nic nenalezeno</div>
            )}
            {searchResults.map(q=>(
              <div key={q.id} className="topic-item" onClick={()=>setSheet({pool:[q]})}>
                <div className="topic-dot" style={{background:CATS[q.cat]?.color}}/>
                <div style={{flex:1}}>
                  <h4 style={{marginBottom:2}}>#{q.id} {q.text.slice(0,55)}{q.text.length>55?"…":""}</h4>
                  <div style={{fontSize:14,color:"var(--text3)",fontFamily:"'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif"}}>{CATS[q.cat]?.label}</div>
                </div>
              </div>
            ))}
            {search.length<2&&<div style={{padding:"32px",textAlign:"center",color:"var(--text3)",fontSize:14}}>Zadejte alespoň 2 znaky</div>}
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* ── KRIZOVÉ SCÉNÁŘE ── */}
      {tab==="home"&&subTab==="scenarios"&&(
        <div className="scr">
          <div className="page-hdr">
            <button className="back-btn" onClick={()=>{if(scOpen){setScOpen(false);setScSel(null);}else{setSubTab(null);setScIdx(0);setScSel(null);setScOpen(false);}}}>← Zpět</button>
            <span className="page-title">Krizové scénáře</span>
            <span style={{marginLeft:"auto",fontSize:14,color:"var(--text3)",fontFamily:"'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif"}}>
              {Object.keys(scDone).length}/{SCENARIOS.length}
            </span>
          </div>
          {!scOpen?(
            /* LIST OF SCENARIOS */
            <div style={{padding:"8px 0"}}>
              {SCENARIOS.map((sc,i)=>(
                <div key={sc.id} className="topic-item" onClick={()=>{setScIdx(i);setScSel(null);setScOpen(true);}}>
                  <span style={{fontSize:22,flexShrink:0}}>{sc.ico}</span>
                  <div style={{flex:1}}>
                    <h4 style={{marginBottom:2}}>{sc.title}</h4>
                    <div style={{fontSize:14,color:"var(--text3)",fontFamily:"'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif"}}>
                      {sc.tema}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <span style={{fontSize:14,color:scDone[sc.id]?"var(--green)":"var(--text3)"}}>
                    {scDone[sc.id]?"✓":"›"}
                  </span>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          ):(
            /* SCENARIO DETAIL */
            (()=>{
              const sc=SCENARIOS[scIdx];
              const isCorrect=scSel===sc.correct;
              return(
                <div>
                  {/* Header */}
                  <div style={{padding:"10px 16px 0",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:10}}>
                    <span style={{fontSize:28}}>{sc.ico}</span>
                    <div>
                      <div style={{fontFamily:"'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif",fontSize:14,color:"var(--text3)",
                        letterSpacing:"1px",textTransform:"uppercase"}}>{sc.tema}</div>
                      <div style={{fontFamily:"'Bebas Neue',sans-serif",fontSize:18,color:"var(--text1)"}}>{sc.title}</div>
                    </div>
                  </div>

                  {/* Situation */}
                  <div style={{margin:"10px 16px",background:"var(--bg2)",border:"1px solid var(--border2)",
                    borderRadius:"var(--radius)",padding:"16px"}}>
                    <div style={{fontFamily:"'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif",fontSize:14,fontWeight:700,
                      letterSpacing:"2px",color:"var(--gold-dim)",textTransform:"uppercase",marginBottom:8}}>
                      Situace
                    </div>
                    <div style={{fontSize:14,color:"var(--text1)",lineHeight:1.6,marginBottom:12}}>{sc.situation}</div>
                    <div style={{fontFamily:"'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif",fontSize:14,fontWeight:700,
                      letterSpacing:"2px",color:"var(--text3)",textTransform:"uppercase",marginBottom:6}}>
                      {sc.question}
                    </div>
                  </div>

                  {/* Choices */}
                  <div className="answers">
                    {sc.choices.map(ch=>{
                      let cls="ans-btn";
                      if(scSel){
                        if(ch.id===sc.correct)cls+=" revealed";
                        if(ch.id===scSel&&ch.id!==sc.correct)cls="ans-btn wrong";
                        if(ch.id===scSel&&ch.id===sc.correct)cls="ans-btn correct";
                      }
                      return(
                        <button key={ch.id} className={cls}
                          onClick={()=>{
                            if(scSel)return;
                            setScSel(ch.id);
                            setScDone(p=>({...p,[sc.id]:ch.id===sc.correct}));
                          }}>
                          <span className="ans-letter">{ch.id}</span>
                          <span>{ch.text}</span>
                        </button>
                      );
                    })}
                  </div>

                  {/* Feedback */}
                  {scSel&&(
                    <>
                      <div className={`feedback ${isCorrect?"ok":"bad"}`}>
                        {isCorrect?"✓ Správně!":"✗ Nesprávně — správná je: "+sc.correct+") "+sc.choices.find(c=>c.id===sc.correct)?.text}
                      </div>
                      <div style={{margin:"8px 16px",background:"rgba(148,180,200,.06)",
                        border:"1px solid rgba(148,180,200,.15)",borderRadius:"var(--radius)",padding:"15px"}}>
                        <div style={{fontFamily:"'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif",fontSize:14,fontWeight:700,
                          letterSpacing:"2px",color:"#94B4C8",textTransform:"uppercase",marginBottom:8}}>
                          ✦ Právní výklad
                        </div>
                        <div style={{fontSize:14,color:"var(--text2)",lineHeight:1.65,fontWeight:600,marginBottom:10}}>
                          {sc.explanation}
                        </div>
                        <div style={{fontSize:14,color:"var(--text3)",fontStyle:"italic"}}>
                          📖 {sc.law}
                        </div>
                      </div>
                      <div className="next-row">
                        <button className="btn-secondary" onClick={()=>{setScSel(null);setScOpen(false);}}>← Zpět na seznam</button>
                        {scIdx+1<SCENARIOS.length&&(
                          <button className="btn-primary" onClick={()=>{setScIdx(scIdx+1);setScSel(null);setScOpen(true);}}>
                            Další scénář →
                          </button>
                        )}
                      </div>
                    </>
                  )}
                </div>
              );
            })()
          )}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* ── MÝTY VS. REALITA ── */}
      {tab==="home"&&subTab==="myths"&&(()=>{
        const sc=mIdx!==null?MYTHS[mIdx]:null;
        return(
          <div className="scr">
            <div className="page-hdr">
              <button className="back-btn" onClick={()=>{if(mIdx!==null){setMIdx(null);}else{setSubTab(null);setMIdx(null);}}}>← Zpět</button>
              <span className="page-title">{mIdx!==null?"Mýtus #"+(mIdx+1):"Mýty vs. Realita"}</span>
            </div>

            {mIdx===null?(
              /* LIST */
              <div style={{padding:"8px 0"}}>
                <div style={{padding:"8px 16px 12px",fontSize:14,color:"var(--text2)",lineHeight:1.6,fontWeight:600}}>
                  Nejčastější omyly a nepřesnosti v oblasti zákona č. 90/2024 Sb.
                  Klikněte na mýtus pro správné vysvětlení s citací zákona.
                </div>
                {MYTHS.map((m,i)=>(
                  <div key={m.id} className="topic-item" onClick={()=>setMIdx(i)}>
                    <span style={{fontSize:20,flexShrink:0}}>💡</span>
                    <div style={{flex:1}}>
                      <h4 style={{marginBottom:2,fontSize:14,lineHeight:1.4}}>{m.myth.slice(0,70)}{m.myth.length>70?"…":""}</h4>
                    </div>
                    <span style={{color:"var(--text3)"}}>›</span>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            ):(
              /* DETAIL */
              <div>
                {/* Myth */}
                <div style={{margin:"10px 16px",background:"rgba(200,90,90,.07)",
                  border:"1px solid rgba(200,90,90,.2)",borderRadius:"var(--radius)",padding:"16px"}}>
                  <div style={{fontFamily:"'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif",fontSize:14,fontWeight:700,
                    letterSpacing:"2px",color:"var(--red)",textTransform:"uppercase",marginBottom:8}}>
                    ✗ Mýtus
                  </div>
                  <div style={{fontSize:14,color:"var(--text1)",lineHeight:1.6,fontStyle:"italic"}}>
                    „{sc.myth}"
                  </div>
                </div>

                {/* Reality */}
                <div style={{margin:"8px 16px",background:"rgba(76,175,121,.07)",
                  border:"1px solid rgba(76,175,121,.2)",borderRadius:"var(--radius)",padding:"16px"}}>
                  <div style={{fontFamily:"'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif",fontSize:14,fontWeight:700,
                    letterSpacing:"2px",color:"var(--green)",textTransform:"uppercase",marginBottom:8}}>
                    ✓ Realita
                  </div>
                  <div style={{fontSize:14,color:"var(--text1)",lineHeight:1.65,fontWeight:600,marginBottom:12}}>
                    {sc.reality}
                  </div>
                  <div style={{fontSize:14,color:"var(--text3)",fontStyle:"italic"}}>
                    📖 {sc.law}
                  </div>
                </div>

                {/* Navigation */}
                <div className="next-row">
                  {mIdx>0&&(
                    <button className="btn-secondary" onClick={()=>setMIdx(mIdx-1)}>← Předchozí</button>
                  )}
                  {mIdx<MYTHS.length-1&&(
                    <button className="btn-primary" onClick={()=>setMIdx(mIdx+1)}>Další →</button>
                  )}
                  {mIdx===MYTHS.length-1&&(
                    <button className="btn-primary" onClick={()=>setMIdx(null)}>✓ Hotovo</button>
                  )}
                </div>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        );
      })()}

      {/* ── AUDIO VÝBĚR ── */}
      {tab==="home"&&subTab==="audio"&&(
        <div className="scr">
          <div className="page-hdr">
            <button className="back-btn" onClick={()=>setSubTab(null)}>← Zpět</button>
            <span className="page-title">🎧 Audio režim</span>
          </div>
          <div style={{padding:"12px 16px",fontSize:14,color:"var(--text2)",lineHeight:1.7,fontWeight:600}}>
            Appka přečte otázky i správné odpovědi. Ideální pro učení v autě, MHD nebo při chůzi.
            Otázky s obrázky budou přeskočeny.
          </div>
          <div className="section-label">
            <div className="section-label-line"/>
            <span className="section-label-text">Vyberte okruh</span>
            <div className="section-label-line"/>
          </div>
          <div className="card-grid">
            {[
              {ico:"🎯",l:"Všechny otázky",d:`${ALL_QUESTIONS.filter(q=>!q.img).length} textových otázek`,
               pool:ALL_QUESTIONS.filter(q=>!q.img)},
              ...Object.entries(CATS).map(([cat,{label,ico,bg}])=>({
                ico,l:label,
                d:`${ALL_QUESTIONS.filter(q=>q.cat===cat&&!q.img).length} otázek`,
                pool:ALL_QUESTIONS.filter(q=>q.cat===cat&&!q.img),
                bg
              })),
              {ico:"⚠️",l:"Slabá místa",
               d:`${Object.entries(weakMap).filter(([id,s])=>s.total>0&&s.correct/s.total<0.7).length} problémových`,
               pool:ALL_QUESTIONS.filter(q=>!q.img&&weakMap[q.id]?.total>0&&weakMap[q.id]?.correct/weakMap[q.id]?.total<0.7)},
            ].map((x,i)=>(
              <div key={i} className="list-card"
                onClick={()=>{if(x.pool.length>0){setSubTab(null);startAudio(x.pool);}else alert("Žádné otázky k dispozici.")}}>
                <div className="list-card-ico" style={{background:x.bg||"var(--bg2)"}}>{x.ico}</div>
                <div className="list-card-text"><h3>{x.l}</h3><p>{x.d}</p></div>
                <span className="list-card-arr">›</span>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* ── PRŮVODCE ── */}
      {tab==="guide"&&(
        <div className="scr">
          {guideIdx===null?(
            <>
              <div className="hero" style={{paddingBottom:16}}>
                <div className="hero-eyebrow">Krok za krokem</div>
                <div className="hero-title" style={{fontSize:38}}>PRŮVOD<span>CE</span></div>
                <div className="hero-sub">Od zájmu po zbrojní oprávnění — zákon č. 90/2024 Sb.</div>
              </div>
              <div className="card-grid" style={{paddingBottom:16}}>
                {GUIDE_STEPS.map((step,i)=>(
                  <div key={step.id} style={{
                    display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:12,
                    padding:"14px 16px",cursor:"pointer",
                    borderBottom:"1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06)",
                    background:guideIdx===i?"rgba(242,194,48,.06)":"transparent"
                  }} onClick={()=>setGuideIdx(i)}>
                    {/* Step number circle */}
                    <div style={{
                      width:36,height:36,borderRadius:"50%",flexShrink:0,
                      background:guideIdx===i?"#F2C230":"#1E2230",
                      border:`2px solid ${guideIdx===i?"#F2C230":"#5A5A8A"}`,
                      display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",
                      fontFamily:"'Bebas Neue',sans-serif",fontSize:16,
                      color:guideIdx===i?"#000":"#AAAADD",fontWeight:700
                    }}>{i+1}</div>
                    {/* Icon + title */}
                    <div style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:10,flex:1}}>
                      <span style={{fontSize:22}}>{step.ico}</span>
                      <div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:700,color:"var(--text1)"}}>{step.title}</div>
                    </div>
                    <span style={{color:"var(--gold)",fontSize:18,fontWeight:700}}>›</span>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            </>
          ):(
            <div>
              <div className="page-hdr">
                <button className="back-btn" onClick={()=>{setGuideIdx(null);setAccordionOpen({});}}>← Zpět</button>
                <span className="page-title">{GUIDE_STEPS[guideIdx]?.ico} {GUIDE_STEPS[guideIdx]?.title}</span>
              </div>
              <div style={{padding:"10px 16px"}}>
                {GUIDE_STEPS[guideIdx]?.content.map((block,i)=>(
                  <GuideBlock key={i} block={block} accordionOpen={accordionOpen} setAccordionOpen={setAccordionOpen}/>
                ))}
              </div>
              <div className="next-row">
                {guideIdx>0&&(
                  <button className="btn-secondary" onClick={()=>{setGuideIdx(guideIdx-1);setAccordionOpen({});}}>← Předchozí</button>
                )}
                {guideIdx<GUIDE_STEPS.length-1&&(
                  <button className="btn-primary" onClick={()=>{setGuideIdx(guideIdx+1);setAccordionOpen({});}}>Další →</button>
                )}
                {guideIdx===GUIDE_STEPS.length-1&&(
                  <button className="btn-primary" onClick={()=>{setGuideIdx(null);setAccordionOpen({});}}>✓ Hotovo</button>
                )}
              </div>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* ── PRAXE ── */}
      {tab==="praxis"&&(
        <div className="scr">
          {praxisIdx===null?(
            <>
              <div className="hero" style={{paddingBottom:16}}>
                <div className="hero-eyebrow">Praktická zkouška</div>
                <div className="hero-title" style={{fontSize:38}}>PRA<span>XE</span></div>
                <div style={{fontSize:14,color:"var(--text2)",fontWeight:500,marginTop:4}}>Manipulace, závady, střelba — dle NV č. 238/2025 Sb.</div>
              </div>
              <div style={{padding:"0 16px 8px",fontSize:14,color:"var(--text3)",lineHeight:1.7,fontWeight:600}}>
                📱 K praktické části ZOZ existuje na YouTube a sociálních sítích řada kvalitních videí od zkušených instruktorů. Tato sekce vás připraví na průběh zkoušky a kritické chyby.
              </div>
              <div className="card-grid" style={{paddingBottom:16}}>
                {PRAXIS_MODULES.map((mod,i)=>(
                  <div key={mod.id} className="list-card" onClick={()=>setPraxisIdx(i)}>
                    <div className="list-card-ico" style={{
                      background:mod.id==="chyby"?"rgba(200,90,90,.1)":
                                 mod.id==="pred_zkouskou"?"rgba(242,194,48,.12)":"var(--bg2)",
                      fontSize:24}}>{mod.ico}</div>
                    <div className="list-card-text">
                      <h3 style={{fontWeight:700}}>{mod.title}</h3>
                      <p style={{color:"var(--text1)",fontWeight:500,fontSize:14}}>{mod.subtitle}</p>
                    </div>
                    <span className="list-card-arr">›</span>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            </>
          ):(
            <div>
              <div className="page-hdr">
                <button className="back-btn" onClick={()=>{setPraxisIdx(null);setAccordionOpen({});}}>← Zpět</button>
                <span className="page-title">{PRAXIS_MODULES[praxisIdx]?.ico} {PRAXIS_MODULES[praxisIdx]?.title}</span>
              </div>

              {/* Komisař říká */}
              {PRAXIS_MODULES[praxisIdx]?.komisar_says&&(
                <div style={{margin:"8px 16px",background:"rgba(148,180,200,.08)",
                  border:"1px solid rgba(148,180,200,.2)",borderRadius:10,padding:"12px 14px",
                  display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"flex-start"}}>
                  <span style={{fontSize:20,flexShrink:0}}>⚖️</span>
                  <div>
                    <div style={{fontFamily:"'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif",fontSize:14,
                      color:"#94B4C8",letterSpacing:"1.5px",textTransform:"uppercase",marginBottom:4}}>
                      Komisař říká:
                    </div>
                    <div style={{fontSize:15,color:"var(--text1)",fontStyle:"italic",fontWeight:600}}>
                      „{PRAXIS_MODULES[praxisIdx].komisar_says}"
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}

              <div style={{padding:"6px 16px"}}>
                {PRAXIS_MODULES[praxisIdx]?.content.map((block,i)=>(
                  <GuideBlock key={i} block={block} accordionOpen={accordionOpen} setAccordionOpen={setAccordionOpen}/>
                ))}
              </div>

              {/* Critical errors */}
              {PRAXIS_MODULES[praxisIdx]?.critical_errors?.length>0&&(
                <div style={{margin:"4px 16px 8px"}}>
                  <div style={{fontFamily:"'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif",fontSize:14,fontWeight:700,
                    letterSpacing:"2px",color:"var(--red)",textTransform:"uppercase",marginBottom:6}}>
                    ❌ Chyby s okamžitým ukončením
                  </div>
                  {PRAXIS_MODULES[praxisIdx].critical_errors.map((e,i)=>(
                    <div key={i} style={{display:"flex",gap:8,padding:"7px 10px",marginBottom:4,
                      background:"rgba(200,90,90,.06)",border:"1px solid rgba(200,90,90,.15)",
                      borderRadius:8,fontSize:14,color:"var(--text1)",fontWeight:500}}>
                      <span style={{color:"var(--red)",flexShrink:0}}>❌</span>{e}
                    </div>
                  ))}
                </div>
              )}

              <div className="next-row">
                {praxisIdx>0&&(
                  <button className="btn-secondary" onClick={()=>{setPraxisIdx(praxisIdx-1);setAccordionOpen({});}}>← Předchozí</button>
                )}
                {praxisIdx<PRAXIS_MODULES.length-1&&(
                  <button className="btn-primary" onClick={()=>{setPraxisIdx(praxisIdx+1);setAccordionOpen({});}}>Další →</button>
                )}
                {praxisIdx===PRAXIS_MODULES.length-1&&(
                  <button className="btn-primary" onClick={()=>{setPraxisIdx(null);setAccordionOpen({});}}>✓ Hotovo</button>
                )}
              </div>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* ── ZÁLOŽKY PRÁZDNÉ ── */}
      {tab==="home"&&subTab==="bookmarks"&&(
        <div className="scr">
          <div className="page-hdr">
            <button className="back-btn" onClick={()=>setSubTab(null)}>← Zpět</button>
            <span className="page-title">Záložky</span>
          </div>
          <div style={{padding:"48px 20px",textAlign:"center",color:"var(--text3)"}}>
            <div style={{fontSize:40,marginBottom:14}}>🔖</div>
            <div style={{fontSize:14,fontWeight:600,color:"var(--text2)",marginBottom:6,fontFamily:"'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif",letterSpacing:".5px"}}>Zatím žádné záložky</div>
            <div style={{fontSize:14,fontWeight:600}}>Při procvičování klikněte na 🏳️ u otázky</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* ── STATISTIKY ── */}
      {tab==="stats"&&(()=>{
        // Streak
        const today=new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10);
        const dates=[...new Set(history.map(h=>h.date))].sort().reverse();
        let streak=0;
        let checkDate=new Date();
        for(let i=0;i<dates.length;i++){
          const d=checkDate.toISOString().slice(0,10);
          if(dates[i]===d){streak++;checkDate.setDate(checkDate.getDate()-1);}
          else if(i===0&&dates[i]!==today)break;
          else break;
        }
        const recent=history.slice(-10);
        const catStats=Object.keys(CATS).map(cat=>{
          const entries=history.filter(h=>h.cats&&h.cats[cat]?.total>0);
          if(!entries.length)return{cat,avg:null};
          const avg=Math.round(entries.reduce((s,h)=>s+(h.cats[cat].correct/h.cats[cat].total*100),0)/entries.length);
          return{cat,avg};
        });
        const weakCount=Object.values(weakMap).filter(s=>s.total>0&&s.correct/s.total<0.7).length;
        const mastCount=Object.values(weakMap).filter(s=>s.total>=3&&s.correct/s.total>=0.9).length;

        // Readiness score
        const avgPct=recent.length?Math.round(recent.reduce((s,h)=>s+h.pct,0)/recent.length):0;
        const lastPct=history.length?history[history.length-1].pct:0;
        const totalAnswered=Object.values(weakMap).filter(s=>s.total>0).length;
        const coverage=Math.round(totalAnswered/ALL_QUESTIONS.length*100);
        const readiness=Math.round(avgPct*0.5+lastPct*0.3+coverage*0.2);
        const trend=history.length>=2?history[history.length-1].pct-history[history.length-2].pct:0;
        const getStatus=()=>{
          if(readiness>=86&&weakCount<10)return{label:"Připraven ke zkoušce",color:"var(--green)",ico:"✅",msg:"Výsledky naznačují vysokou pravděpodobnost úspěchu. Doporučujeme ještě 1-2 testy."};
          if(readiness>=75)return{label:"Téměř připraven",color:"var(--gold)",ico:"🟡",msg:`Dobrý základ. Zaměřte se na ${weakCount} slabých otázek.`};
          if(readiness>=60)return{label:"V přípravě",color:"#94B4C8",ico:"📚",msg:"Procvičujte systematicky. Doporučujeme projít slabá místa."};
          return{label:"Potřeba více přípravy",color:"var(--red)",ico:"⚠️",msg:"Výsledky nedosahují potřebné úrovně. Procvičujte po kategoriích."};
        };
        const status=history.length>=3?getStatus():null;

        // Badges
        const totalAnswered2=ta||history.reduce((s,h)=>s+h.total,0);
        const totalCorrect2=tc||history.reduce((s,h)=>s+h.correct,0);
        const allScenariosDone=Object.keys(scDone).length>=SCENARIOS.length;
        const badges=[
          {id:"first_pass",ico:"🎯",name:"První úspěch",desc:"Splněn první test (26+/30)",
           earned:history.some(h=>h.pct>=87&&(h.mode==="exam"||h.mode==="commissioner"))},
          {id:"extended_zo",ico:"⚖️",name:"Rozšířené ZO",desc:"Splněno rozšířené ZO (28+/30)",
           earned:history.some(h=>h.correct>=28&&(h.mode==="exam"||h.mode==="commissioner"))},
          {id:"streak3",ico:"🔥",name:"3 dny v řadě",desc:"Studium 3 dny po sobě",
           earned:streak>=3},
          {id:"streak7",ico:"🔥🔥",name:"Týden v řadě",desc:"Studium 7 dní po sobě",
           earned:streak>=7},
          {id:"streak14",ico:"🔥🔥🔥",name:"Dva týdny",desc:"Studium 14 dní po sobě",
           earned:streak>=14},
          {id:"q500",ico:"💪",name:"500 otázek",desc:"Zodpovězeno 500 otázek",
           earned:totalAnswered2>=500},
          {id:"q1000",ico:"🏋️",name:"1000 otázek",desc:"Zodpovězeno 1000 otázek",
           earned:totalAnswered2>=1000},
          {id:"perfect_legal",ico:"📜",name:"Právní expert",desc:"100% v Právních předpisech",
           earned:history.some(h=>h.cats?.zákon?.total>0&&h.cats.zákon.correct===h.cats.zákon.total&&h.cats.zákon.total>=5)},
          {id:"perfect_health",ico:"🩺",name:"Zdravotník",desc:"100% ve Zdravotnickém minimu",
           earned:history.some(h=>h.cats?.zdraví?.total>0&&h.cats.zdraví.correct===h.cats.zdraví.total&&h.cats.zdraví.total>=3)},
          {id:"bookmarks10",ico:"🔖",name:"Záložkář",desc:"10 uložených záložek",
           earned:bkQs.length>=10},
          {id:"scenarios",ico:"⚡",name:"Krizový expert",desc:"Dokončeny všechny krizové scénáře",
           earned:allScenariosDone},
          {id:"master",ico:"🏆",name:"Mistr ZO",desc:"Splněno 10 testů s 90%+",
           earned:history.filter(h=>h.pct>=90).length>=10},
        ];
        const earnedBadges=badges.filter(b=>b.earned);

        return(
        <div className="scr">
          <div className="hero" style={{paddingBottom:16}}>
            <div className="hero-eyebrow">Váš pokrok</div>
            <div className="hero-title" style={{fontSize:38}}>STATIST<span>IKY</span></div>
          </div>

          {/* HLAVNÍ ČÍSLA */}
          <div className="stat-grid">
            {[
              ["Zodpovězeno",ta||history.reduce((s,h)=>s+h.total,0)],
              ["Správně",tc||history.reduce((s,h)=>s+h.correct,0)],
              ["%",ta?Math.round(tc/ta*100):(history.length?Math.round(history.reduce((s,h)=>s+h.pct,0)/history.length):0)],
              ["Testů",history.length],
              ["🔥 Dní v řadě",`${streak}`],
              ["⚠️ Slabá",weakCount],
              ["✅ Zvládnutá",mastCount],
              ["Záložek",bkQs.length],
            ].map(([l,v])=>(
              <div key={l} style={{background:"#111520",border:"2px solid rgba(242,194,48,.45)",borderRadius:"var(--radius)",padding:16,textAlign:"center",position:"relative",overflow:"hidden"}}>
                <div style={{fontFamily:"'Bebas Neue',sans-serif",fontSize:38,color:"#F2C230",
                  fontWeight:700,lineHeight:1,letterSpacing:"1px",
                  textShadow:"0 0 14px rgba(242,194,48,.7)"}}>{v}</div>
                <div style={{fontSize:12,color:"#FFFFFF",marginTop:4,
                  fontFamily:"'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif",fontWeight:700,
                  letterSpacing:".5px",textTransform:"uppercase"}}>{l}</div>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>

          {/* ODZNAKY */}
          <div className="section-label">
            <div className="section-label-line"/>
            <span className="section-label-text">Odznaky {earnedBadges.length}/{badges.length}</span>
            <div className="section-label-line"/>
          </div>
          <div style={{padding:"0 16px 8px",display:"flex",flexWrap:"wrap",gap:10}}>
            {badges.map(b=>(
              <div key={b.id} style={{
                background:"#111520",
                border:"2px solid rgba(242,194,48,.45)",
                borderRadius:14,
                padding:"12px 14px",
                display:"flex",
                alignItems:"center",
                gap:10,
                minWidth:"45%",
                flex:1,
                boxShadow:"0 0 12px rgba(242,194,48,.12)",
              }}>
                <span style={{
                  fontSize:26,
                  flexShrink:0,
                  opacity:b.earned?1:.45,
                  filter:b.earned?"drop-shadow(0 0 4px rgba(242,194,48,0.5))":"grayscale(1)",
                }}>{b.ico}</span>
                <div style={{flex:1}}>
                  <div style={{
                    fontSize:15,
                    fontWeight:700,
                    color:"#F2C230",
                    fontFamily:"'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif",
                    letterSpacing:".5px",
                    marginBottom:3,
                  }}>{b.name}</div>
                  <div style={{
                    fontSize:13,
                    color:"#FFFFFF",
                    fontWeight:600,
                    lineHeight:1.5,
                  }}>{b.desc}</div>
                </div>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>

          {/* JSEM PŘIPRAVEN? */}
          {status&&(
            <>
              <div className="section-label">
                <div className="section-label-line"/>
                <span className="section-label-text">Jsem připraven?</span>
                <div className="section-label-line"/>
              </div>
              <div style={{margin:"0 16px 10px",background:"var(--bg1)",border:`1px solid ${status.color}44`,
                borderRadius:"var(--radius)",padding:"18px",position:"relative",overflow:"hidden"}}>
                <div style={{position:"absolute",top:0,left:0,right:0,height:3,background:status.color,opacity:.7}}/>
                <div style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:16,marginBottom:12}}>
                  <div style={{width:70,height:70,borderRadius:"50%",flexShrink:0,position:"relative",
                    background:`conic-gradient(${status.color} 0%, ${status.color} ${readiness}%, var(--bg3) ${readiness}%)`,
                    display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center"}}>
                    <div style={{position:"absolute",width:52,height:52,borderRadius:"50%",background:"var(--bg1)"}}/>
                    <div style={{position:"relative",fontFamily:"'Bebas Neue',sans-serif",fontSize:19,color:status.color}}>{readiness}%</div>
                  </div>
                  <div>
                    <div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:700,color:status.color,fontFamily:"'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif",letterSpacing:".5px",marginBottom:3}}>
                      {status.ico} {status.label}
                    </div>
                    <div style={{fontSize:14,color:"var(--text3)"}}>
                      Odhad úspěchu u zkoušky: <strong style={{color:"var(--text2)"}}>{Math.min(99,Math.round(readiness*1.1))}%</strong>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div style={{fontSize:14,color:"var(--text2)",lineHeight:1.6,marginBottom:12,fontWeight:600}}>{status.msg}</div>
                <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr 1fr",gap:8}}>
                  {[["Průměr testů",`${avgPct}%`],["Pokryto",`${coverage}%`],["Trend",trend>=0?`+${trend}%`:`${trend}%`]].map(([l,v])=>(
                    <div key={l} style={{background:"var(--bg2)",borderRadius:8,padding:"8px",textAlign:"center"}}>
                      <div style={{fontFamily:"'Bebas Neue',sans-serif",fontSize:17,color:l==="Trend"?(trend>=0?"var(--green)":"var(--red)"):"var(--gold)"}}>{v}</div>
                      <div style={{fontSize:14,color:"var(--text3)",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:"1px"}}>{l}</div>
                    </div>
                  ))}
                </div>
              </div>
            </>
          )}
          {!status&&history.length<3&&(
            <div style={{margin:"8px 16px",padding:"14px",background:"var(--bg1)",border:"1px solid var(--border2)",borderRadius:"var(--radius)",fontSize:14,color:"var(--text3)",textAlign:"center"}}>
              📊 Dokončete alespoň 3 testy pro zobrazení skóre připravenosti
            </div>
          )}

          {/* GRAF POSLEDNÍCH TESTŮ */}
          {recent.length>0&&(
            <>
              <div className="section-label">
                <div className="section-label-line"/>
                <span className="section-label-text">
                  {recent.length===1?"Poslední test":
                   recent.length<=4?`Poslední ${recent.length} testy`:
                   `Posledních ${recent.length} testů`}
                </span>
                <div className="section-label-line"/>
              </div>
              <div style={{margin:"0 16px",background:"var(--bg1)",border:"1px solid var(--border2)",borderRadius:"var(--radius)",padding:"16px 12px"}}>
                <div style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"flex-end",gap:4,height:100,position:"relative"}}>
                  {[0,26,50,75,100].map(y=>(
                    <div key={y} style={{position:"absolute",left:0,right:0,bottom:`${y}%`,
                      borderTop:`1px dashed ${y===26?"rgba(242,194,48,.5)":"var(--border2)"}`,zIndex:0}}/>
                  ))}
                  {recent.map((h,i)=>(
                    <div key={i} style={{flex:1,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",alignItems:"center",gap:4,position:"relative",zIndex:1}}>
                      <div style={{fontSize:13,color:"#FFFFFF",fontWeight:700,lineHeight:1}}>{h.pct}%</div>
                      <div style={{width:"100%",height:`${h.pct}%`,borderRadius:"3px 3px 0 0",minHeight:3,
                        background:h.pct>=80?"var(--green)":h.pct>=50?"var(--gold)":"var(--red)"}}/>
                    </div>
                  ))}
                </div>
                <div style={{display:"flex",gap:4,marginTop:6}}>
                  {recent.map((h,i)=>(
                    <div key={i} style={{flex:1,textAlign:"center",fontSize:10,color:"#DDDDDD",fontWeight:600}}>
                      {h.date?.slice(5)}<br/>{h.mode==="commissioner"?"⚖️":h.mode==="exam"?"🎯":"📖"}
                    </div>
                  ))}
                </div>
                <div style={{fontSize:14,color:"#FFFFFF",marginTop:6,textAlign:"center",fontStyle:"italic",fontWeight:600}}>
                  Zlatá linka = hranice 26/30 pro obecné ZO
                </div>
              </div>
            </>
          )}

          {/* KATEGORIE */}
          {history.length>0&&catStats.some(c=>c.avg!==null)&&(
            <>
              <div className="section-label">
                <div className="section-label-line"/>
                <span className="section-label-text">Průměr dle kategorií</span>
                <div className="section-label-line"/>
              </div>
              <div style={{margin:"0 16px",background:"var(--bg1)",border:"1px solid var(--border2)",borderRadius:"var(--radius)",padding:"14px"}}>
                {catStats.map(({cat,avg})=>{
                  if(avg===null)return null;
                  const {ico,label,color}=CATS[cat];
                  return(
                    <div key={cat} style={{marginBottom:10}}>
                      <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",marginBottom:4}}>
                        <span style={{fontSize:15,color:"#FFFFFF",fontWeight:600}}>{ico} {label}</span>
                        <span style={{fontSize:14,fontWeight:600,color:avg>=80?"var(--green)":avg>=50?"var(--gold)":"var(--red)"}}>{avg}%</span>
                      </div>
                      <div style={{height:5,background:"var(--bg3)",borderRadius:3,overflow:"hidden"}}>
                        <div style={{height:"100%",width:`${avg}%`,borderRadius:3,background:avg>=80?"var(--green)":avg>=50?"var(--gold)":"var(--red)"}}/>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  );
                })}
              </div>
            </>
          )}

          {history.length===0&&(
            <div style={{padding:"24px 20px",textAlign:"center",color:"var(--text3)"}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:36,marginBottom:10}}>📊</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:14,color:"#CCCCCC",fontWeight:500}}>Zatím žádná data — nejprve dokončete test</div>
            </div>
          )}

          {/* NASTAVENÍ */}
          <div className="section-label" style={{marginTop:8}}>
            <div className="section-label-line"/>
            <span className="section-label-text">Nastavení</span>
            <div className="section-label-line"/>
          </div>
          <div style={{padding:"0 16px 8px",display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:8}}>
            <button onClick={()=>setDarkMode(d=>!d)}
              style={{width:"100%",padding:"13px",border:"1px solid var(--border2)",borderRadius:"var(--radius)",
                background:"var(--bg1)",color:"var(--text2)",fontFamily:"'Barlow',sans-serif",
                fontSize:14,cursor:"pointer",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",gap:8}}>
              {darkMode?"☀️  Světlý režim":"🌙  Tmavý režim"}
            </button>
            {history.length>0&&(
              <button onClick={()=>{if(window.confirm("Smazat historii testů?")){setHistory([]);setTa(0);setTc(0);}}}
                style={{width:"100%",padding:"13px",border:"1px solid rgba(200,90,90,.2)",borderRadius:"var(--radius)",
                  background:"rgba(200,90,90,.05)",color:"var(--red)",fontFamily:"'Barlow',sans-serif",fontSize:14,cursor:"pointer"}}>
                🗑 Smazat historii testů
              </button>
            )}
          </div>
          <div style={{padding:"8px 20px 16px",fontSize:14,color:"var(--text3)",lineHeight:1.7,fontWeight:600}}>
            ZbrojakAI v7.3 · MV soubor 15.12.2025 · zákon č. 90/2024 Sb.<br/>
            Aplikace není náhradou studia zákona č. 90/2024 Sb.
          </div>
        </div>
        );
      })()}

            {/* ── CHAT ── */}
      {tab==="chat"&&(
        <div className="scr chat-screen">
          <div className="chat-hdr">
            <button className="back-btn" onClick={()=>setTab("home")}>←</button>
            <div>
              <div className="chat-title">AI INSTRUKTOR</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:14,color:"var(--text3)",fontFamily:"'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif",letterSpacing:"1px"}}>ZÁKON Č. 90/2024 Sb. + 4 NV</div>
            </div>
            <div className="online-dot"/>
          </div>
          <div className="chat-msgs">
            {msgs.map((m,i)=>(
              <div key={i} className={`msg ${m.r==="a"?"ai":"user"}`}>{m.t}</div>
            ))}
            {cl&&<div className="msg ai thinking">ZbrojakAI píše…</div>}
            <div ref={chatEnd}/>
          </div>
          {/* Voice mode toggle */}
          <div style={{padding:"0 16px 8px",display:"flex",gap:8}}>
            <button onClick={()=>setVoiceMode(v=>!v)}
              style={{flex:1,padding:"10px",borderRadius:"var(--radius)",cursor:"pointer",
                border:`1px solid ${voiceMode?"var(--gold)":"var(--border2)"}`,
                background:voiceMode?"rgba(242,194,48,.1)":"var(--bg1)",
                color:voiceMode?"var(--gold)":"var(--text2)",
                fontFamily:"'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif",fontSize:14,fontWeight:600,
                letterSpacing:"1px"}}>
              {voiceMode?"🎙️ Hlasový mód ZAPNUT":"🎙️ Zapnout hlasový mód"}
            </button>
          </div>

          {/* Voice interface */}
          {voiceMode&&(
            <div style={{margin:"0 16px 12px",background:"var(--bg2)",
              border:`1px solid ${voiceListening?"var(--red)":voiceSpeaking?"var(--green)":"var(--border2)"}`,
              borderRadius:"var(--radius)",padding:"20px",textAlign:"center",
              transition:"border-color .3s"}}>
              <div style={{fontFamily:"'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif",fontSize:11,
                letterSpacing:"2px",textTransform:"uppercase",marginBottom:16,
                color:voiceListening?"var(--red)":voiceSpeaking?"var(--green)":voiceStatus==="thinking"?"var(--gold)":"var(--text3)"}}>
                {voiceListening?"🔴 Poslouchám...":
                 voiceStatus==="thinking"?"⏳ Přemýšlím...":
                 voiceSpeaking?"🔊 Mluvím...":
                 "🎙️ Připraven"}
              </div>
              {voiceTranscript&&(
                <div style={{fontSize:14,color:"var(--text1)",fontWeight:500,
                  marginBottom:14,fontStyle:"italic",lineHeight:1.5,
                  background:"var(--bg1)",padding:"10px 12px",borderRadius:8}}>
                  „{voiceTranscript}"
                </div>
              )}
              <button
                onClick={voiceListening?stopListening:voiceSpeaking?stopSpeaking:startListening}
                style={{width:72,height:72,borderRadius:"50%",cursor:"pointer",
                  border:"none",fontSize:28,
                  background:voiceListening?"var(--red)":voiceSpeaking?"var(--green)":"var(--gold)",
                  color:"#000",
                  boxShadow:voiceListening?"0 0 20px rgba(200,90,90,.5)":
                             voiceSpeaking?"0 0 20px rgba(76,175,121,.5)":
                             "0 0 20px rgba(242,194,48,.3)"}}>
                {voiceListening?"⏹":voiceSpeaking?"⏸":"🎙️"}
              </button>
              <div style={{fontSize:12,color:"var(--text3)",marginTop:12,fontWeight:500}}>
                {voiceListening?"Mluvte... klikněte pro zastavení":
                 voiceSpeaking?"Instruktor mluví... klikněte pro přerušení":
                 "Klikněte a mluvte"}
              </div>
            </div>
          )}

          <div className="chat-input-row">
            <input className="chat-inp" value={ci} onChange={e=>setCi(e.target.value)}
              onKeyDown={e=>e.key==="Enter"&&sendChat()} placeholder="Napište otázku…"/>
            <button className="chat-send" onClick={sendChat}>↑</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* BOTTOM NAV */}
      {tab!=="quiz"&&(
        <nav className="bnav">
          {[{k:"home",i:"🏠",l:"Domů"},{k:"guide",i:"📋",l:"Průvodce"},{k:"praxis",i:"🔫",l:"Praxe"},{k:"stats",i:"📊",l:"Statistiky"},{k:"chat",i:"🤖",l:"AI Chat"}].map(x=>(
            <button key={x.k} className={`ni ${tab===x.k?"on":""}`}
              onClick={()=>{setTab(x.k);if(tab===x.k)setSubTab(null);}}>
              <span>{x.i}</span><span>{x.l}</span>
            </button>
          ))}
        </nav>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

export default ZbrojakAI;
